prompt:
Create a dreamy photorealistic fantasy portrait in a sunlit park beside a small pond, showing a young woman in sweet pink lolita fashion kneeling next to her tiny summoned familiar, a cherry blossom fairy named *リリィ*. The woman has a deliberately obscured/featureless rectangular face area, short pastel pink-blonde bob hair with a pink ribbon bow, white gloves, a pale pink blouse with lace collar and large bow, a pink tweed pinafore dress, white lace socks, pink Mary Jane shoes, a small name badge, and a black rosary-like cross necklace; she holds up a peace sign with her right hand while crouching warmly toward the fairy. The fairy is a small doll-like sakura spirit with pale skin, huge glossy eyes, short fluffy pink hair, translucent insect wings, bare feet, and a dress made from many pink cherry blossoms; she sits near the base of a tree root with one hand raised, surrounded by glowing sparkles and scattered petals. Set the scene in a soft-focus green park with tall trees, dappled afternoon sunlight, a bench and water in the background, shallow depth of field, pastel color grading, bokeh, magical particles, and clusters of cherry blossoms in the foreground. Add handwritten pale pink Japanese text in the upper left: title ＊リリィ＊, followed by a short description reading 桜の精霊
春の訪れを告げる存在。
感情に寄り添い、
心をふわりと軽くする。
花びらの魔法で
傷ついた心を癒す。. Include a small doodled bow icon near the text. Keep the composition vertical 4:5, whimsical, tender, high detail, realistic photography blended with fantasy doll aesthetics, no extra characters, no watermark.
